title: Floral Crisp Comforting Ukrainian Tomato Stir-fry
description: A floral and comforting Ukrainian dish featuring smoky paprika in a low-fat-friendly preparation with crisp textures.

ingredients.name: Ukraine-style tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Fresh or canned, preferably not overly ripe

ingredients.name: Low-sodium tomato sauce
ingredients.notes: For a reduced-fat version, use low-fat alternatives

ingredients.name: Ukrainian paprika flakes or smoked paprika
Dijon mustard paste or vinegar alternative
ingredients.notes: To enhance the dish without adding too much fat

ingredients.name: Chopped fresh parsley and dill
ingredients.notes: To add freshness to the dish

instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add garlic cloves and minced paprika, cooking until fragrant but not browned.
Pour in tomato sauce, broth, and mustard paste. Stir well.
Add halved tomatoes, bringing the mixture to a simmer. Cook for about 5 minutes.
If desired, add milk or yogurt for a rich finish; stir gently once added.
Stir in chopped herbs (parsley and dill) last, until just wilted and well-combined with the sauce.
Turn off heat immediately to maintain its floral freshness. Serve hot.
